title: Legumes Pathology (Chickpea): Report of work June 1989-July 1990
abstract:
At ICRISAT Center, Patancheru, large number of chickpea
breeding mataria1s and several nurseries were screened in wilt sick plots. The material was planted in 4-meter rows,
60 cm apart. Susceptible check JG 62 which was planted after
every two test rows, showed 100% mortality within a month
after sowing...
